description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a dynamic color palette of white, blue, black, and subtle pink accents. The upper is constructed from a combination of mesh and synthetic materials, providing breathability and structural support. The shoe has a standard criss-cross lacing system with white laces speckled with pink, and a padded collar for comfort. The midsole is thick and white, designed for cushioning, while the outsole appears to be made of durable rubber with a textured grip. The side panels display layered synthetic overlays in blue and black, adding both style and reinforcement. The overall design is sporty and suitable for urban environments, with no visible branding or logos.
description: A modern, multi-colored athletic sneaker with mesh and synthetic overlays, featuring a thick cushioned sole and standard lacing. The design is sporty and visually striking, ideal for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered blue, black, and white synthetic panels, mesh toe box, and pink-speckled laces.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded heel collar, blue mesh lining, and the back of the white midsole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar color blocking and visible perforations on the white synthetic panel.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the mesh toe box, lacing system, and the rounded shape of the toe area.
